remarks: Nice, quiet, desirable neighborhood. Corner end-unit condo with hardwood floor. Unit has a 1-car garage with garage door opener. Heat, hot water and cold water are included in HOA. The building's hallway has new carpeting and interior paint. No dogs allowed in the building. This is a great investment property. Washer and Dryer in the basement (coin operated), Extra storage space in the basement. Tenant-occupied with $1750/month rent until 01/31/2027. Tenant would like to stay. Located near Stew Leonard's and public transportation. Near the border of Westport. This neighborhood has a good school system.
